figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of the proposed method. The model adaptively adjusts the schedulers in the left blue box based on the feedback from previous learning. The patch size scheduler and shuffle ratio scheduler regulate the patch size and shuffle ratio. Then, relation patches are in-place shuffled across the same batch, maintaining their relative positions the same in images. Lastly, the mixed and original images are fed into the Weekly Supervised Segmentation Network for twins’ steps training in the green boxes.
Table 1: Dice score (%) and IoU (%) of methods for weakly supervised semantic segmentation. Ours w/o FL denotes the proposed method without the feedback learning. The best results are in bold.
